TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == tu sep tu nem mihcaan kasienawan Aw-lin-pi-ke yundukay 2026 == saka tusa a bataan idaw ku lima kasienawan Aw-lin-pi-ke yundukay "inyi : the XXV Olympic Winter Games, Fa-yi: Les XXV√®mes Jeux olympiques d'hiver, Yi-ta-li-yi: XXV Giochi olimpici invernali, saan u Mi-lan-Ke-ti-na-tay-pi-suo kasienawan Aw-huy, Mi-lan-Ke-ti-na-tay-pi-suo kasienawan Aw-huy, hakiya Mi-lan kasienawan Aw-huy, itida i tu sep tu nem mihcaan tu bulad nem demiad katukuh tu tu demiad itida i Yi-ta-li-mi-lan, Ke-ti-na-tay-pi-suo sikawaw tu kanatal mapulungay nu yundukay. :the XXV Olympic Winter Games,Ê≥ïË™û:Les XXV√®mes Jeux olympiques d'hiver,Áæ©Â§ßÂà©Ë™û:XXV Giochi olimpici invernali), . tu sep cay siw mihcaan nem bulad tu sip demiad, Mi-lan-Ke-ti-na-tay-pi-suo itida i cay lu sip cye kanatal Aw-lin-pi-ke wiyenhuy kasasakamuan maala u tu sep tu nem mihcaan sakay tusa a bataan idaw ku lima a cye kasienawan Aw-huu a mikawaway nu tukayan. 2019Âπ¥6Êúà24Êó•,Á±≥Ëò≠- . Mi-lan-Ke-ti-na-tay-pi-suo kasienawan Aw-huy sayaway nu tusaay a tukayan mapulung a pangangan tu Aw-lin-pi-ke yun-tung-huy. sakakinasepat si kawaw tina Aw-yun-huy " caay pakayda tu kina tusa nu kitakidan a nikalepacawan tu hetikan i cay siw sip sip mihcaan tu Aw-huy", u tu seps ep nem mihcaan Tu-lin Aw-huy nikuda tu tusa a bataan kina cacayaca a sikawaw tina kasienawan nu Aw-huy. sayaway nina Mi-lan sikawaw tina Aw-huy, u Ke-ti-na-tay-pi-suo namaka cay siw lim nem mihcaan tu sakakina pitu a cyi nu kasienawan Aw-huy nikudan tu laad ti pitu a bataan kina cacayayca sikawaw tina kasienawan Aw-huy. Á±≥Ëò≠- . kasasetsetan nu kitidaan ÊØîË≥ΩÂÝ¥È§® tu sep tu nem mihcaan kasienawan Aw-lin-pi-ke yen-tung-huy itida i Yi-ta-li amis a Mi-lan-mi-lan-a-sa-ke-a-sa-ke-puo-e-mi-puo-e-mi-aw-li-wi-ni-aw-li-wi-ni-aw-ke-ti-na-tay-pi-suo-ke-ti-na-tay-pi-suo-la-sun-An-tay-say-e-wa-la-sun‚ÄîAn-tay-say-e-wa-pu-lei-ta-cuo-pu-lei-cuo-tay-say-lu-tay-say-luo-wi-luo-na-wi-luo-na kitidaan itida i Pei-yi-ta-li nu kitidaan, sikawaway silusi' tu langdaway a kulitan. 2026 . kasikawawan tina kasasetsetan micukaymas tu Lun-pa-ti tabakiay nu niyadu'an atu Yi-ta-li wali amis a idaway tu nu kakitidaan, pasu cay siw lim nem mihcaan Ke-ti-na-pi-suo kasienawan Aw-huy atu tu sep cay lu mihcaan Te-lun-ti-nuo sen kusikawaway tina kasienawan kitakid tabakiay cacudadan miwundukayay tu nanicukaymasan. u pin-hu nu dumaan tu sakasetsetan, ina u sakay suledaan a niksetsetan itida namin i Mi-lin sasetsetan sikawaw, sakay suledaan atu pisaselican nu nikasetsetan itida kakenisan i Ke-ti-na, Wa-e-tay-li-na atu Huy-ye-mei-san-buyuan nu lilikan masasetset. . u Tay-wi.Ci-pu-e-de kinamisikiay a 1.6wan nu yadahay a sakasetset nu ti-yi-kun itida i Mi-lin-sen-cu-li-ya kitidaan tu patideng, sikawaw tina sakay kulian nu mimaliay. kalingatuan itida i Sen-si-luo ti-yi-cen sikawaw, nina matenesay tu nu likisian a Wi-luo-na sasetsetan mikawaw tu sakahedekan. .
S.PHON: == tu s…ôp tu n…ôm miƒß ¶aan kasi…ônawan aw-r~…æin-pi-k…ô jundukaj **** == saka tusa a bataan idaw ku r~…æima kasi…ônawan aw-r~…æin-pi-k…ô jundukaj "inji : tƒß…ô *** or~…æjmpi ¶ wint…ôr gam…ôs, fa-ji: r~…æ…ôs ****m…ôs *…ôu* or~…æjmpi*u…ôs d î~ °ƒßi*…ôr, ji-ta-r~…æi-ji: *** gio ¶ƒßi or~…æimpi ¶i in*…ôrnar~…æi, saan u mi-r~…æan-k…ô-ti-na-taj-pi-suo kasi…ônawan aw-ƒßuj, mi-r~…æan-k…ô-ti-na-taj-pi-suo kasi…ônawan aw-ƒßuj, ƒßakija mi-r~…æan kasi…ônawan aw-ƒßuj, itida i tu s…ôp tu n…ôm miƒß ¶aan tu bur~…æad n…ôm d…ômiad katukuƒß tu tu d…ômiad itida i ji-ta-r~…æi-mi-r~…æan, k…ô-ti-na-taj-pi-suo sikawaw tu kanatar~…æ mapur~…æu≈ãaj nu jundukaj. :tƒß…ô *** or~…æjmpi ¶ wint…ôr gam…ôs,**:r~…æ…ôs ****m…ôs *…ôu* or~…æjmpi*u…ôs d î~ °ƒßi*…ôr,****:*** gio ¶ƒßi or~…æimpi ¶i in*…ôrnar~…æi), . tu s…ôp ¶aj siw miƒß ¶aan n…ôm bur~…æad tu sip d…ômiad, mi-r~…æan-k…ô-ti-na-taj-pi-suo itida i ¶aj r~…æu sip ¶j…ô kanatar~…æ aw-r~…æin-pi-k…ô wij…ônƒßuj kasasakamuan maar~…æa u tu s…ôp tu n…ôm miƒß ¶aan sakaj tusa a bataan idaw ku r~…æima a ¶j…ô kasi…ônawan aw-ƒßuu a mikawawaj nu tukajan. **********,**- . mi-r~…æan-k…ô-ti-na-taj-pi-suo kasi…ônawan aw-ƒßuj sajawaj nu tusaaj a tukajan mapur~…æu≈ã a pa≈ãa≈ãan tu aw-r~…æin-pi-k…ô jun-tu≈ã-ƒßuj. sakakinas…ôpat si kawaw tina aw-jun-ƒßuj " ¶aaj pakajda tu kina tusa nu kitakidan a nikar~…æ…ôpa ¶awan tu ƒß…ôtikan i ¶aj siw sip sip miƒß ¶aan tu aw-ƒßuj", u tu s…ôps …ôp n…ôm miƒß ¶aan tu-r~…æin aw-ƒßuj nikuda tu tusa a bataan kina ¶a ¶aja ¶a a sikawaw tina kasi…ônawan nu aw-ƒßuj. sajawaj nina mi-r~…æan sikawaw tina aw-ƒßuj, u k…ô-ti-na-taj-pi-suo namaka ¶aj siw r~…æim n…ôm miƒß ¶aan tu sakakina pitu a ¶ji nu kasi…ônawan aw-ƒßuj nikudan tu r~…æaad ti pitu a bataan kina ¶a ¶ajaj ¶a sikawaw tina kasi…ônawan aw-ƒßuj. **- . kasas…ôts…ôtan nu kitidaan **** tu s…ôp tu n…ôm miƒß ¶aan kasi…ônawan aw-r~…æin-pi-k…ô j…ôn-tu≈ã-ƒßuj itida i ji-ta-r~…æi amis a mi-r~…æan-mi-r~…æan-a-sa-k…ô-a-sa-k…ô-puo-…ô-mi-puo-…ô-mi-aw-r~…æi-wi-ni-aw-r~…æi-wi-ni-aw-k…ô-ti-na-taj-pi-suo-k…ô-ti-na-taj-pi-suo-r~…æa-sun-an-taj-saj-…ô-wa-r~…æa-sun*an-taj-saj-…ô-wa-pu-r~…æ…ôi-ta- ¶uo-pu-r~…æ…ôi- ¶uo-taj-saj-r~…æu-taj-saj-r~…æuo-wi-r~…æuo-na-wi-r~…æuo-na kitidaan itida i p…ôi-ji-ta-r~…æi nu kitidaan, sikawawaj sir~…æusi î~ ° tu r~…æa≈ãdawaj a kur~…æitan. **** . kasikawawan tina kasas…ôts…ôtan mi ¶ukajmas tu r~…æun-pa-ti tabakiaj nu nijadu î~ °an atu ji-ta-r~…æi war~…æi amis a idawaj tu nu kakitidaan, pasu ¶aj siw r~…æim n…ôm miƒß ¶aan k…ô-ti-na-pi-suo kasi…ônawan aw-ƒßuj atu tu s…ôp ¶aj r~…æu miƒß ¶aan t…ô-r~…æun-ti-nuo s…ôn kusikawawaj tina kasi…ônawan kitakid tabakiaj ¶a ¶udadan miwundukajaj tu nani ¶ukajmasan. u pin-ƒßu nu dumaan tu sakas…ôts…ôtan, ina u sakaj sur~…æ…ôdaan a niks…ôts…ôtan itida namin i mi-r~…æin sas…ôts…ôtan sikawaw, sakaj sur~…æ…ôdaan atu pisas…ôr~…æi ¶an nu nikas…ôts…ôtan itida kak…ônisan i k…ô-ti-na, wa-…ô-taj-r~…æi-na atu ƒßuj-j…ô-m…ôi-san-bujuan nu r~…æir~…æikan masas…ôts…ôt. . u taj-wi. ¶i-pu-…ô-d…ô kinamisikiaj a *.*wan nu jadaƒßaj a sakas…ôts…ôt nu ti-ji-kun itida i mi-r~…æin-s…ôn- ¶u-r~…æi-ja kitidaan tu patid…ô≈ã, sikawaw tina sakaj kur~…æian nu mimar~…æiaj. kar~…æi≈ãatuan itida i s…ôn-si-r~…æuo ti-ji- ¶…ôn sikawaw, nina mat…ôn…ôsaj tu nu r~…æikisian a wi-r~…æuo-na sas…ôts…ôtan mikawaw tu sakaƒß…ôd…ôkan. .
S.FORM: == tu sep tu nem mihcaan kasienawan Aw-lin-pi-ke yundukay 2026 == saka tusa a bataan idaw ku lima kasienawan Aw-lin-pi-ke yundukay "inyi : the XXV Olympic Winter Games, Fa-yi: Les XXV√®mes Jeux olympiques d'hiver, Yi-ta-li-yi: XXV Giochi olimpici invernali, saan u Mi-lan-Ke-ti-na-tay-pi-suo kasienawan Aw-huy, Mi-lan-Ke-ti-na-tay-pi-suo kasienawan Aw-huy, hakiya Mi-lan kasienawan Aw-huy, itida i tu sep tu nem mihcaan tu bulad nem demiad katukuh tu tu demiad itida i Yi-ta-li-mi-lan, Ke-ti-na-tay-pi-suo sikawaw tu kanatal mapulungay nu yundukay. :the XXV Olympic Winter Games,Ê≥ïË™û:Les XXV√®mes Jeux olympiques d'hiver,Áæ©Â§ßÂà©Ë™û:XXV Giochi olimpici invernali), . tu sep cay siw mihcaan nem bulad tu sip demiad, Mi-lan-Ke-ti-na-tay-pi-suo itida i cay lu sip cye kanatal Aw-lin-pi-ke wiyenhuy kasasakamuan maala u tu sep tu nem mihcaan sakay tusa a bataan idaw ku lima a cye kasienawan Aw-huu a mikawaway nu tukayan. 2019Âπ¥6Êúà24Êó•,Á±≥Ëò≠- . Mi-lan-Ke-ti-na-tay-pi-suo kasienawan Aw-huy sayaway nu tusaay a tukayan mapulung a pangangan tu Aw-lin-pi-ke yun-tung-huy. sakakinasepat si kawaw tina Aw-yun-huy " caay pakayda tu kina tusa nu kitakidan a nikalepacawan tu hetikan i cay siw sip sip mihcaan tu Aw-huy", u tu seps ep nem mihcaan Tu-lin Aw-huy nikuda tu tusa a bataan kina cacayaca a sikawaw tina kasienawan nu Aw-huy. sayaway nina Mi-lan sikawaw tina Aw-huy, u Ke-ti-na-tay-pi-suo namaka cay siw lim nem mihcaan tu sakakina pitu a cyi nu kasienawan Aw-huy nikudan tu laad ti pitu a bataan kina cacayayca sikawaw tina kasienawan Aw-huy. Á±≥Ëò≠- . kasasetsetan nu kitidaan ÊØîË≥ΩÂÝ¥È§® tu sep tu nem mihcaan kasienawan Aw-lin-pi-ke yen-tung-huy itida i Yi-ta-li amis a Mi-lan-mi-lan-a-sa-ke-a-sa-ke-puo-e-mi-puo-e-mi-aw-li-wi-ni-aw-li-wi-ni-aw-ke-ti-na-tay-pi-suo-ke-ti-na-tay-pi-suo-la-sun-An-tay-say-e-wa-la-sun‚ÄîAn-tay-say-e-wa-pu-lei-ta-cuo-pu-lei-cuo-tay-say-lu-tay-say-luo-wi-luo-na-wi-luo-na kitidaan itida i Pei-yi-ta-li nu kitidaan, sikawaway silusi' tu langdaway a kulitan. 2026 . kasikawawan tina kasasetsetan micukaymas tu Lun-pa-ti tabakiay nu niyadu'an atu Yi-ta-li wali amis a idaway tu nu kakitidaan, pasu cay siw lim nem mihcaan Ke-ti-na-pi-suo kasienawan Aw-huy atu tu sep cay lu mihcaan Te-lun-ti-nuo sen kusikawaway tina kasienawan kitakid tabakiay cacudadan miwundukayay tu nanicukaymasan. u pin-hu nu dumaan tu sakasetsetan, ina u sakay suledaan a niksetsetan itida namin i Mi-lin sasetsetan sikawaw, sakay suledaan atu pisaselican nu nikasetsetan itida kakenisan i Ke-ti-na, Wa-e-tay-li-na atu Huy-ye-mei-san-buyuan nu lilikan masasetset. . u Tay-wi.Ci-pu-e-de kinamisikiay a 1.6wan nu yadahay a sakasetset nu ti-yi-kun itida i Mi-lin-sen-cu-li-ya kitidaan tu patideng, sikawaw tina sakay kulian nu mimaliay. kalingatuan itida i Sen-si-luo ti-yi-cen sikawaw, nina matenesay tu nu likisian a Wi-luo-na sasetsetan mikawaw tu sakahedekan. .

mi-r~…æan-k…ô-ti-na-taj-pi-suo kasi…ônawan aw-ƒßuj, ƒßakija mi-r~…æan kasi…ônawan aw-ƒßuj, itida i tu s…ôp tu n…ôm miƒß ¶aan tu bur~…æad n…ôm d…ômiad katukuƒß tu tu d…ômiad itida i ji-ta-r~…æi-mi-r~…æan, k…ô-ti-na-taj-pi-suo sikawaw tu kanatar~…æ mapur~…æu≈ãaj nu jundukaj. :tƒß…ô *** or~…æjmpi ¶ wint…ôr gam…ôs,**:r~…æ…ôs ****m…ôs *…ôu* or~…æjmpi*u…ôs d î~ °ƒßi*…ôr,****:*** gio ¶ƒßi or~…æimpi ¶i in*…ôrnar~…æi), . tu s…ôp ¶aj siw miƒß ¶aan n…ôm bur~…æad tu sip d…ômiad, mi-r~…æan-k…ô-ti-na-taj-pi-suo itida i ¶aj r~…æu sip ¶j…ô kanatar~…æ aw-r~…æin-pi-k…ô wij…ônƒßuj kasasakamuan maar~…æa u tu s…ôp tu n…ôm miƒß ¶aan sakaj tusa a bataan idaw ku r~…æima a ¶j…ô kasi…ônawan aw-ƒßuu a mikawawaj nu tukajan. **********,**- . mi-r~…æan-k…ô-ti-na-taj-pi-suo kasi…ônawan aw-ƒßuj sajawaj nu tusaaj a tukajan mapur~…æu≈ã a pa≈ãa≈ãan tu aw-r~…æin-pi-k…ô jun-tu≈ã-ƒßuj. sakakinas…ôpat si kawaw tina aw-jun-ƒßuj " ¶aaj pakajda tu kina tusa nu kitakidan a nikar~…æ…ôpa ¶awan tu ƒß…ôtikan i ¶aj siw sip sip miƒß ¶aan tu aw-ƒßuj", u tu s…ôps …ôp n…ôm miƒß ¶aan tu-r~…æin aw-ƒßuj nikuda tu tusa a bataan kina ¶a ¶aja ¶a a sikawaw tina kasi…ônawan nu aw-ƒßuj. sajawaj nina mi-r~…æan sikawaw tina aw-ƒßuj, u k…ô-ti-na-taj-pi-suo namaka ¶aj siw r~…æim n…ôm miƒß ¶aan tu sakakina pitu a ¶ji nu kasi…ônawan aw-ƒßuj nikudan tu r~…æaad ti pitu a bataan kina ¶a ¶ajaj ¶a sikawaw tina kasi…ônawan aw-ƒßuj. **- . kasas…ôts…ôtan nu kitidaan **** tu s…ôp tu n…ôm miƒß ¶aan kasi…ônawan aw-r~…æin-pi-k…ô j…ôn-tu≈ã-ƒßuj itida i ji-ta-r~…æi amis a mi-r~…æan-mi-r~…æan-a-sa-k…ô-a-sa-k…ô-puo-…ô-mi-puo-…ô-mi-aw-r~…æi-wi-ni-aw-r~…æi-wi-ni-aw-k…ô-ti-na-taj-pi-suo-k…ô-ti-na-taj-pi-suo-r~…æa-sun-an-taj-saj-…ô-wa-r~…æa-sun*an-taj-saj-…ô-wa-pu-r~…æ…ôi-ta- ¶uo-pu-r~…æ…ôi- ¶uo-taj-saj-r~…æu-taj-saj-r~…æuo-wi-r~…æuo-na-wi-r~…æuo-na kitidaan itida i p…ôi-ji-ta-r~…æi nu kitidaan, sikawawaj sir~…æusi î~ ° tu r~…æa≈ãdawaj a kur~…æitan. **** . kasikawawan tina kasas…ôts…ôtan mi ¶ukajmas tu r~…æun-pa-ti tabakiaj nu nijadu î~ °an atu ji-ta-r~…æi war~…æi amis a idawaj tu nu kakitidaan, pasu ¶aj siw r~…æim n…ôm miƒß ¶aan k…ô-ti-na-pi-suo kasi…ônawan aw-ƒßuj atu tu s…ôp ¶aj r~…æu miƒß ¶aan t…ô-r~…æun-ti-nuo s…ôn kusikawawaj tina kasi…ônawan kitakid tabakiaj ¶a ¶udadan miwundukajaj tu nani ¶ukajmasan. u pin-ƒßu nu dumaan tu sakas…ôts…ôtan, ina u sakaj sur~…æ…ôdaan a niks…ôts…ôtan itida namin i mi-r~…æin sas…ôts…ôtan sikawaw, sakaj sur~…æ…ôdaan atu pisas…ôr~…æi ¶an nu nikas…ôts…ôtan itida kak…ônisan i k…ô-ti-na, wa-…ô-taj-r~…æi-na atu ƒßuj-j…ô-m…ôi-san-bujuan nu r~…æir~…æikan masas…ôts…ôt. . u taj-wi. ¶i-pu-…ô-d…ô kinamisikiaj a *.*wan nu jadaƒßaj a sakas…ôts…ôt nu ti-ji-kun itida i mi-r~…æin-s…ôn- ¶u-r~…æi-ja kitidaan tu patid…ô≈ã, sikawaw tina sakaj kur~…æian nu mimar~…æiaj. kar~…æi≈ãatuan itida i s…ôn-si-r~…æuo ti-ji- ¶…ôn sikawaw, nina mat…ôn…ôsaj tu nu r~…æikisian a wi-r~…æuo-na sas…ôts…ôtan mikawaw tu sakaƒß…ôd…ôkan. .
